label: 点列表生网格
description: 输入一个 point2d 列表和一张区域网格，输出与区域同形状的 0/1 mask：落在区域有效（非零）格、且命中点列表位置的格点标记为 1，其余为 0。坐标约定：x→列、y→行，四舍五入；越界或落在区域外的点忽略。
description-en: Take a list of point2d and a region grid; output a 0/1 mask (same shape as the region) where cells that lie on a valid (non-zero) region cell AND hit a point in the list are marked 1, others 0. Coordinates: x→column, y→row, rounded; out-of-bounds or outside-region points are ignored.
icon: 深色网格背景上有一片浅色有效区域，区域内若干格被亮紫色点命中后高亮成实心方格，区域外的点被忽略，扁平插画风格小图标，主色紫白两种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 01（或多值）区域网格；只有非零有效格上的点才会被标记。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) region grid; only points on non-zero valid cells are marked.

outputs.name: mask
outputs.label: 输出掩码
outputs.description: 与输入区域同形状的 0/1 mask，命中点处为 1。
outputs.description-en: A 0/1 mask (same shape as the region) with 1s at hit points.
